title: elatine triandra var. brachysperma
intro: Elatine triandra var. brachysperma, also known as dwarf water-willow, is a plant species belonging to the Elatine genus and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elatine triandra var. brachysperma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, with its leaves and stems being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
